text.tspan: The International Consortium for Agile (ICAgile) hereby certifies that, having
successfully completed the learning and evaluation for this certification, the
holder shall be recognized as an ICAgile Certified Professional in
Agile Leadership, with rights to affix and display the letters ICP-LEA.
This certification signifies knowledge acquired as assessed by instructors.

svg.text: only and holds no official or legal value.
